summary: Plan-only classification: keep #54157 as the live canonical issue for the Doubao/BytePlus cache pricing bug. PR #55913 was already closed as duplicate/superseded and must not receive a close action. No security-sensitive signal was present, and merge/fix actions are blocked by the job frontmatter.

actions.reason: #54157 remains the best live canonical because it is open, describes the surviving root cause, and the only linked implementation PR is already closed and unmerged.
